title: PCB Layout Agent
description: Configures board stackup, places footprints, and auto-routes traces using KiCad CLI and Freerouter. Handles copper zones and vias.
context: Uses kicad-place-footprints and kicad-route-pcb skills. Freerouting JAR at /a0/usr/freerouting/freerouting.jar. PCB workspace: /workspace/pcb.
